name: Quick Apple Cranberry Pear Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg Pillsbury Apple Cinnamon Quick Bread Mix
1 cup fresh or frozen cranberries, thawed
1 large firm pear, peeled, cut into 1/2" cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Line paper baking cups or grease 18 muffin cups.
3. In a large bowl, combine the quick bread mix, buttermilk, oil, and egg. Stir until the mixture is moistened.
4. Stir in the cranberries, walnuts, and pear.
5. Spoon the batter into the prepared muffin cups (the cups will be full).
6. Bake for 18 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown. Serve warm or cool.
